name: smartthink-rich
description: Advanced Trading Platform with Real-time Charting, Indicators, and Scanner

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix backend && npm run format --prefix frontend

author: SmartThink Rich Team
